title: Harmony Cell Identity Record — Extended
description: Extended cell identity schema for the Harmony Identity Registry. Adds spatial geometry fields (cube face, grid position, edge length, area, distortion factor) and adjacency (adjacent_cell_keys). Extends v0.1.2 schema. Schema version 0.1.3.

canonical_id.description: Immutable canonical identifier for this cell. Generated by the registry using a CSPRNG. Format: hc_ + 9 Crockford Base32 characters.

cell_key.description: Deterministic spatial address derived from cell centroid geometry via BLAKE3. Format: hsam:r{level:02d}:{region}:{hash_16_chars}. The hash fragment is 16 Crockford Base32 characters (80 bits). Updated from v0.1.2 illustrative 5-char hash to production 16-char hash per Session 2 decision D3.

resolution_level.description: Grid resolution level. 0 = planetary (~12,742 km), 12 = sub-metre (~0.76 m at face centre). Determines the grid density: 4^r cells per axis per cube face.

cube_face.description: Cube face index (0-5) from the gnomonic projection. 0=+X, 1=-X, 2=+Y, 3=-Y, 4=+Z, 5=-Z. Determines which face of the enclosing cube this cell belongs to.

face_grid_u.description: Grid column index (u-axis) on the cube face. Range: 0 to 4^resolution_level - 1. Together with cube_face, face_grid_v, and resolution_level, this uniquely identifies the cell in the grid.

face_grid_v.description: Grid row index (v-axis) on the cube face. Range: 0 to 4^resolution_level - 1.

edge_length_m.description: Approximate edge length of this cell in metres on the WGS84 ellipsoid surface. Varies by position due to gnomonic distortion. Computed from the cell's UV position and resolution level.

area_m2.description: Approximate area of this cell in square metres on the WGS84 ellipsoid surface. Varies by position due to gnomonic distortion.

distortion_factor.description: Linear distortion factor relative to the face-centre cell at the same resolution. 1.0 at face centre, up to ~2.3 at cube face corners. Computed as sqrt(1 + u_c^2 + v_c^2) where (u_c, v_c) is the cell centroid in UV space.

centroid_ecef.description: Cell centroid in ECEF coordinates on the WGS84 ellipsoid (altitude = 0). This is the exact point used as input to the BLAKE3 hash for cell_key derivation.

latitude.description: Geodetic latitude of the cell centroid in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Geodetic longitude of the cell centroid in decimal degrees.

centroid_geodetic.description: Cell centroid in WGS84 geodetic coordinates. Derived from the ECEF centroid. Stored for human readability and geospatial queries.

adjacent_cell_keys.description: Edge-adjacent cell keys in fixed order: [+u, -u, +v, -v]. Exactly 4 entries. Computed from the boundary transition table in cell_adjacency_spec.md §3.2. All cells at all resolution levels have exactly 4 edge neighbours.

human_alias.description: Human-friendly short alias. Format: 2-4 uppercase letters + dash + 1-6 digits. Optional.

alias_namespace.description: Fully qualified alias namespace. Required if human_alias is set.

friendly_name.description: Human-readable descriptive name for this cell. Optional.

known_names.description: RESERVED for named-entity resolution. Multi-valued natural-language names. Indexed by registry, resolved by Pillar 5 Conversational Spatial Agent. See ADR-008.

semantic_labels.description: Semantic classification labels for this cell. Example: 'High-growth coastal residential zone'.

status.description: Lifecycle status. See identity-schema.md for state transition rules.

schema_version.description: Schema version. This schema is 0.1.3 (extended from 0.1.2 with spatial geometry and adjacency fields).

valid_from.description: RESERVED for temporal versioning. Owned by Pillar 4. See ADR-007.

valid_to.description: RESERVED for temporal versioning. Owned by Pillar 4. See ADR-007.

version_of.description: RESERVED for temporal versioning. Owned by Pillar 4. See ADR-007.

temporal_status.description: RESERVED for temporal versioning. Owned by Pillar 4. See ADR-007.

fidelity_coverage.description: RESERVED for dual fidelity. Owned by Pillar 2.

lod_availability.description: RESERVED for dual fidelity. Owned by Pillar 2.

asset_bundle_count.description: RESERVED for dual fidelity. Denormalised count of asset bundles.

parent_cell_id.description: Canonical ID of this cell's parent at resolution_level - 1. Null for Level 0 cells.

child_cell_ids.description: Canonical IDs of this cell's 16 children at resolution_level + 1. Empty if children not yet registered.

dataset_ids.description: RESERVED. Datasets attached to this cell.

state_ids.description: RESERVED. State records for this cell.

asset_bundles.description: RESERVED for dual fidelity. Owned by Pillar 2.

successor_id.description: RESERVED. Canonical ID of the cell that supersedes this one.
